name: Stock tab displays all stock items for a part with quantity, location and status
steps:
Given a part 'Capacitor 100uF' exists with two stock items: one at location 'Shelf A1' with quantity 50 and status 'OK', and one at location 'Shelf B2' with quantity 10 and status 'Damaged'
Given a user with view permission is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Capacitor 100uF' and clicks the 'Stock' tab
Then the Stock table displays a row for location 'Shelf A1' with quantity '50' and status 'OK'
Then the Stock table displays a row for location 'Shelf B2' with quantity '10' and status 'Damaged'

name: Stock tab is visible on the part detail page
steps:
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' exists in the system
Given a user with view permission is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Resistor 10k'
Then the 'Stock' tab is visible in the part tab navigation bar

name: Stock tab shows empty state when a part has no stock items
steps:
Given a part 'New Untouched Part' exists with no stock items
Given a user with view permission is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'New Untouched Part' and clicks the 'Stock' tab
Then the Stock table shows no rows or an empty state message indicating no stock items are available

name: Export downloads a file containing stock item data for the selected part
steps:
Given a part 'Inductor 10uH' exists with at least one stock item
Given a user with view permission is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Inductor 10uH' on the 'Stock' tab
When the user clicks the 'Export' button in the Stock tab toolbar
Then an export options dialog is displayed
When the user selects export format 'CSV' and clicks 'Download'
Then a file is downloaded containing stock item data for 'Inductor 10uH'

name: Export dialog allows selecting export format before downloading
steps:
Given a part 'Diode 1N4148' exists with two stock items
Given a user with view permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Diode 1N4148'
When the user clicks the 'Export' button
Then an export options dialog appears with format selection options
When the user selects the 'XLSX' format option and clicks 'Download'
Then the dialog closes and an XLSX file download is initiated

name: Export button is available in the Stock tab toolbar
steps:
Given a part 'LED Red 5mm' exists with at least one stock item
Given a user with view permission is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'LED Red 5mm' and clicks the 'Stock' tab
Then an 'Export' button is visible in the Stock tab toolbar

name: New Stock Item button launches a creation dialog
steps:
Given a part 'Transistor BC547' exists in the system
Given a user with stock add permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Transistor BC547'
When the user clicks the 'New Stock Item' button
Then a dialog to create a new Stock Item appears with fields for quantity, location, and status

name: Creating a new stock item via the dialog adds it to the stock table
steps:
Given a part 'Fuse 1A' exists with no stock items
Given a location 'Warehouse Row 3' exists
Given a user with stock add permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Fuse 1A'
When the user clicks the 'New Stock Item' button
When the user enters '25' in the 'Quantity' field
When the user selects 'Warehouse Row 3' in the 'Location' field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the Stock table displays a new row with quantity '25' at location 'Warehouse Row 3'

name: Creating a new stock item with zero quantity is rejected
steps:
Given a part 'Relay 12V' exists in the system
Given a user with stock add permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Relay 12V'
When the user clicks the 'New Stock Item' button
When the user enters '0' in the 'Quantity' field
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then an error message is displayed indicating that quantity must be greater than zero
Then no new stock item is created for 'Relay 12V'

name: New Stock Item button is hidden from users without stock add permission
steps:
Given a part 'Connector USB-C' exists in the system
Given a user with view-only permission (no stock add permission) is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Connector USB-C' and clicks the 'Stock' tab
Then the 'New Stock Item' button is not visible in the Stock tab toolbar

name: Stock Actions drop-down is enabled when stock items are selected in the table
steps:
Given a part 'Potentiometer 10k' exists with at least one stock item
Given a user with stock edit permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Potentiometer 10k'
When the user selects one or more rows in the Stock table using the row checkboxes
Then the 'Stock Actions' drop-down menu becomes enabled and is clickable

name: Stock Actions drop-down is disabled when no stock items are selected
steps:
Given a part 'Crystal 16MHz' exists with at least one stock item
Given a user with stock edit permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Crystal 16MHz'
When the user views the Stock tab with no rows selected
Then the 'Stock Actions' drop-down menu is disabled or not actionable

name: Stock Actions move operation transfers selected stock items to a new location
steps:
Given a part 'Op-Amp LM741' exists with a stock item at location 'Bin A' with quantity 30
Given locations 'Bin A' and 'Bin B' exist
Given a user with stock move permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Op-Amp LM741'
When the user selects the stock item row for location 'Bin A'
When the user opens the 'Stock Actions' drop-down and selects 'Move'
When the user selects 'Bin B' as the destination location and clicks 'Submit'
Then the Stock table shows the stock item is now located at 'Bin B'
Then no stock item remains at 'Bin A' for 'Op-Amp LM741'

name: Stock Actions count operation updates the quantity of a selected stock item
steps:
Given a part 'Switch SPDT' exists with a stock item showing quantity 20
Given a user with stock count permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Switch SPDT'
When the user selects the stock item row in the Stock table
When the user opens the 'Stock Actions' drop-down and selects 'Count'
When the user enters '18' in the quantity field and clicks 'Submit'
Then the Stock table row reflects the updated quantity '18' for that stock item

name: Stock Actions delete removes selected stock items from the table
steps:
Given a part 'Buzzer 5V' exists with two stock items
Given a user with stock delete permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Buzzer 5V'
When the user selects the first stock item row
When the user opens the 'Stock Actions' drop-down and selects 'Delete'
When the user confirms the deletion in the confirmation dialog
Then the selected stock item no longer appears in the Stock table
Then the remaining second stock item is still present in the table

name: Stock table shows total in-stock quantity across all locations
steps:
Given a part 'Capacitor 47uF' exists with stock items: 20 units at 'Shelf C1' and 15 units at 'Shelf C2'
Given a user with view permission is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Capacitor 47uF' and clicks the 'Stock' tab
Then the Stock tab or part detail header reflects a total available quantity of '35'

name: Stock tab reflects the status of each stock item accurately
steps:
Given a part 'Thermistor NTC' exists with stock items having statuses 'OK', 'Attention', and 'Damaged'
Given a user with view permission is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Thermistor NTC' and clicks the 'Stock' tab
Then the Stock table displays each stock item with its correct status: 'OK', 'Attention', and 'Damaged' respectively

name: Stock Actions are not available to users without stock edit permission
steps:
Given a part 'Relay 5V' exists with a stock item
Given a user with view-only permission (no stock edit or delete permissions) is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'Relay 5V' and clicks the 'Stock' tab
Then the 'Stock Actions' drop-down menu is not visible or all stock action options are disabled

name: New Stock Item inherits the part automatically in the creation dialog
steps:
Given a part 'IC NE555' exists in the system
Given a user with stock add permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'IC NE555'
When the user clicks the 'New Stock Item' button
Then the creation dialog pre-populates the 'Part' field with 'IC NE555'

name: Stock tab for a trackable part shows serial numbers for each stock item
steps:
Given a part 'PCB Assembly v1' exists and is marked as 'Trackable'
Given three stock items with serial numbers 'SN-001', 'SN-002', 'SN-003' exist for this part
Given a user with view permission is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'PCB Assembly v1' and clicks the 'Stock' tab
Then the Stock table displays individual rows for serial numbers 'SN-001', 'SN-002', and 'SN-003'

name: Export button for a part with no stock items produces an empty or header-only file
steps:
Given a part 'Empty Component' exists with no stock items
Given a user with view permission is logged in and on the 'Stock' tab of the part detail page for 'Empty Component'
When the user clicks the 'Export' button and downloads the file
Then the exported file is downloadable (no error occurs) and contains only the header row with no data rows
